title: COPY --from=$SOME_ARGUMENT doesn't find earlier stages
body:
### Issue Description

When I have in `Containerfile` something like `COPY --from=$ARGUMENT` where `ARGUMENT` resolves to an image stage, it doesn't find it.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Write a dockerfile like:
```Dockerfile
ARG PORTA_IMAGE=builder

FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi7-minimal as builder
WORKDIR /
RUN echo generate something > foo.txt

FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi7-minimal
ARG PORTA_IMAGE
WORKDIR /
COPY --from=$PORTA_IMAGE foo.txt bar.txt
```
2. `podman build --squash -t ttt -f Containerfile .`

### Describe the results you received

```
🐚 podman build --squash -t ttt -f Containerfile.bug .
[2/2] STEP 1/4: FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi7-minimal
[2/2] STEP 2/4: ARG PORTA_IMAGE
[2/2] STEP 3/4: WORKDIR /
[2/2] STEP 4/4: COPY --from=$PORTA_IMAGE foo.txt bar.txt

? Please select an image: 
  ▸ registry.fedoraproject.org/builder:latest
    registry.access.redhat.com/builder:latest
    docker.io/library/builder:latest
    quay.io/builder:latest

Error: COPY --from=builder: no stage or image found with that name
```

### Describe the results you expected

Build should succeed.
